printed.name: Circles Down
printed.setup: Lying supine in neutral spine position. Legs straight, perpendicular to floor. Hips externally rotated. Feet in straps, plantarflexed.

movement.inhale: Open legs and circle around, lift legs, return to start position

cues: Draw straight line down center, squeezing heels together
Draw two semi-circles back to back as legs circle around
